selections.name: Good Boy
selections.reason: Won last start at Bordeaux, drops into a winnable claiming spot here and fits the class parameters perfectly.

selections.name: Dicanto
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid 3rd two starts back at Saint-Cloud. Should appreciate the sweeping final turn.

selections.name: Europe
selections.reason: Drawn well inside which is a distinct advantage here. Showed improvement last out and offers value.

selections.name: Jolie City
selections.reason: Gets the rail draw and has been running evenly in similar company. Can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Naad'in
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up in this spot if the pace collapses.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-2, Trifecta 1 / 2,8,9 / ALL

selections.name: Toimy Son
selections.reason: Classy veteran with over $268k in earnings. Just missed last out and looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Shutterwood
selections.reason: Winner two back and has tactical speed. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the figures to overcome it.

selections.name: Abacur
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start and has been knocking on the door. Fits well in this claiming tier.

selections.name: Mikey
selections.reason: Winner last out and draws well inside. Will be forwardly placed and dangerous if left alone.

danger_horse.name: Goluptious
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and has shown flashes of ability. Could sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: Puerto Madero
selections.reason: Strong 2nd last start and has the tactical positioning to excel on this track. Top contender.

selections.name: Dazzle At Dawn (gb)
selections.reason: Inside draw and coming off a solid 2nd. Should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Sedition (gb)
selections.reason: Winner last out but has to overcome a very wide draw. Will need a smart ride.

selections.name: Jubile
selections.reason: Winner last start and seems to be rounding into form. Worth including in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Blanche Sacree
danger_horse.reason: Good inside draw and has back class. Could surprise if the pace is hot.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #6, Exacta Box 6-13, Trifecta 6,13 / 4,6,8,13 / ALL

selections.name: Marie De Prusse (ire)
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd last out and draws perfectly inside. Should get the ideal box seat trip.

selections.name: Haya Land
selections.reason: Rail draw is a huge plus at this distance. Consistent performer who will be in the mix.

selections.name: Forza Sedaca
selections.reason: Another with a great inside draw. Finished 2nd last start and fits the class profile.

selections.name: Cocoon Quatre
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last out. Has the stamina for this marathon distance.

danger_horse.name: Lucio Vero (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day.

selections.name: Natorspeed Essef
selections.reason: Impressive winner last out and gets the coveted rail draw. Looks very tough to beat here.

selections.name: Hello Louis
selections.reason: Has shown ability but must navigate a tricky wide draw. Figures put him right in this.

selections.name: New Run
selections.reason: Forgive the last start; prior form was solid and draws well inside.

selections.name: Au Dela Des Mers
selections.reason: Winner last out but steps up in class and draws wide. Still a factor.

danger_horse.name: Valtrada
danger_horse.reason: Winner two back and could rebound at a price.

selections.name: Baristo
selections.reason: Dominant winner last start. Looks to be a cut above this claiming field.

selections.name: Leha
selections.reason: Great inside draw and has been running consistently well. The main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Guns And Roses
selections.reason: Good draw and has back class. Should get a nice trip just off the pace.

selections.name: Roman Lady
selections.reason: Ignore the last start; prior 2nd makes her a strong exotic inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Glow Up
danger_horse.reason: Could show early speed and hang on for a minor award.

selections.name: Bankhovski
selections.reason: Has been facing tougher company and should appreciate the class drop here.

selections.name: Bedda Vita (ire)
selections.reason: Winner last out and seems to be improving. A major player in this spot.

selections.name: Nelson Dream
selections.reason: Inside draw is a plus. Has shown enough in the past to be considered a threat.

selections.name: Veules Les Roses
selections.reason: Needs to improve but has the pedigree to handle the distance.

danger_horse.name: Must Be Crackers
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a better effort than recent lines suggest.

races.exotic_strategy: Win Bet #3, Exacta Box 3-4, Trifecta 3,4 / 3,4,5,8 / ALL

selections.name: Kourpluvix
selections.reason: Classy runner who won last out. Draws well and looks very difficult to beat in this allowance.

selections.name: Aloysius
selections.reason: Has back class and should bounce back from a subpar effort last time.

selections.name: Darkava
selections.reason: Stakes placed in the past. If she finds her best form, she will be right there.

selections.name: If Not Now (gb)
selections.reason: Consistent earner who rarely runs a bad race. Good for the bottom of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Sharp Rise (gb)
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and has tactical speed to be a nuisance.
